card1.paragraph1: Learning a language is more than memorizing grammar rules. It's about discovering different cultures, connecting with other people and living new experiences.
card1.paragraph2: That's what learning a new language is all about. It is an adventure in which you completely immerse yourself in the Spanish-speaking world.

card2.paragraph1: Spanish with E is a project designed to help you achieve your goals in an entertaining and effective way. In addition to learning the language, you will get to know the culture of Spanish-speaking countries in person.
card2.paragraph2: Programs are adapted and personalized according to your needs and desires, ensuring that learning is rewarding and engaging.

title: Goal
Mission
Commitment
paragraph: Guarantee learning Spanish in an attractive way for all people.
Push students to new levels of language ability and cultural understanding.
Spread the language and culture of Spanish-speaking countries around the world.

card4.paragraph1: Be part of our community of 'travelers' on our Discord server and learn Spanish in company.
card4.paragraph2: You will never be alone on this exciting journey of learning a new language and exploring distant cultures. You will provide support, whether in the form of a guide, companion or map.
card4.paragraph3: As a Spanish with E student, you will have full access.

cards5.title: Connect with your interests
cards5.paragraph: Integrate Spanish into your daily routine, into your hobbies and hobbies

cards5.title: Learn by doing
cards5.paragraph: Increase your fluency with projects, activities and conversations with native speakers

cards5.title: Travel and discover culture
cards5.paragraph: Get to know Spanish-speaking countries with teachers and tourist guides

cards5.title: Join our community
cards5.paragraph: Talk about your favorite topics with teachers and students

card6.paragraph: We welcome you to Español con E, where learning becomes an exciting adventure.
